authors: Dianbin Cao;Dongze Xu;Yanluan Lin;Yi Deng;Xuelong Chen;Qiang Zhang;Meng Gao;Xu Zhang
title: Anthropogenic aerosols can shape the winter mid-latitude cyclone tracks
abstract:
Anthropogenic aerosols can shape the winter mid-latitude cyclone tracks 
 Mid-latitude cyclones are “parent storms” of various weather hazards and contribute significantly to the moisture and heat intrusion into the Arctic. Anthropogenic aerosols are known to affect cyclone intensities and their associated precipitation, but their impacts on cyclone tracks remain largely unclear. Here, based on both observational data diagnosis and global climate model simulations, we show that anthropogenic aerosols over East Asia can lead to a significant poleward drift of mid-latitude cyclone tracks in winter over the North Pacific. By suppressing precipitation in the southeastern sector of cyclones and enhancing it in the northeastern sector, aerosols increase the positive potential vorticity tendency northeast of the cyclones, thereby driving their poleward drift. This might give rise to more cyclones migrating into the Arctic over the North Pacific, reducing the Arctic sea ice extent in recent decades. In the future, efforts to reduce aerosol emissions in East Asia could potentially mitigate the poleward migration of the storm track driven by global warming.

explanation: 该论文研究深度学习天气预测模型（DLWP）GenCast的物理一致性，涉及动能谱（KE）和差异动能谱（DKE）分析，与大气环境遥感技术中的空气质量监测、卫星观测和大气成分分析密切相关。
authors: Hisu Kim;Jihun Ryu;Seok-Woo Son;Jee-Hoon Jeong;Hyungjun Kim;Jin-Ho Yoon
title: A spectral test of the butterfly effect and physical consistency in the diffusion-based GenCast’s ensembles
abstract:
A spectral test of the butterfly effect and physical consistency in the diffusion-based GenCast’s ensembles 
 With the rapid development of deep learning weather prediction (DLWP) models like GenCast, rigorous evaluation of their physical consistency is essential. This study investigates the dynamical fidelity of GenCast against ECMWF IFS-HRES and IFS-ENS using comprehensive kinetic energy (KE) and difference kinetic energy (DKE) spectra over 2021. Unlike the physically consistent error growth in IFS-ENS, GenCast exhibits weak planetary-scale growth and a persistent, flattened KE tail at high wavenumbers starting from the first forecast step. These mesoscale artifacts persist across multiple GenCast variants and AIFS-ENS, indicating a broader challenge for noise-conditioned generation. Helmholtz decomposition further reveals white-noise-like variance rather than balanced dynamics. Spatially, weak interactions between large-scale and mesoscale wind fields suggest a misrepresentation of topography-flow interactions. Furthermore, analyses of KE gradient (∣∇KE∣) revealed that GenCast fails to reproduce the sharp, filamentary structures, instead generating broad, isotropic, and noisy patterns. These findings suggest that current noise injection mechanisms in DLWPs produce noisy artifacts mimicking variance without reproducing realistic error growth physics. Improving these mechanisms is vital for developing physically consistent DLWPs.

explanation: 该论文研究的是低硫 marine fuels（船用燃料）排放的 highly light-absorbing particles（强光吸收颗粒物），这些颗粒物对地球的辐射平衡有显著影响，涉及了 air quality monitoring（空气质量监测）和 atmospheric composition analysis（大气成分分析）等领域，因此与大气环境遥感技术密切相关。
authors: Tuukka Kokkola;Timothy A. Sipkens;Andreas Paul;Deeksha Shukla;Mika Ihalainen;Anusmita Das;Jason Scott;Johannes Passig;Aleksandrs Kalamašņikovs;Uwe Etzien;Zheng Fang;Santtu Mikkonen;Anni Hartikainen;Viljami Luostari;Arya Mukherjee;Hendryk Czech;Martin Sklorz;Bert Buchholz;Thorsten Streibel;Thorsten Hohaus;Yinon Rudich;Johan Øvrevik;Ralf Zimmermann;Joel C. Corbin;Olli Sippula
title: Highly light-absorbing particle emissions from low-sulfur marine fuels
abstract:
Highly light-absorbing particle emissions from low-sulfur marine fuels 
 Particulate matter (PM) from marine traffic interacts with solar radiation and clouds, ultimately influencing Earth’s radiative balance. Ships operated with conventional fossil fuel oils emit light-absorbing carbonaceous PM that offsets aerosol-driven cooling and can even exert a net positive radiative forcing, i.e. warming effect. Radiative properties of PM are possibly further altered by atmospheric aging processes, the effects of which are not fully understood. We present black carbon (BC) emission factors (EF) and optical properties of fresh and photochemically aged particle emissions from a marine engine, operated using low-sulfur heavy fuel oil (LS-HFO) and marine gas oil (MGO), complying with recent maritime sulfur regulations by the International Maritime Organization (IMO). The fresh particle emissions comprised mostly BC, with average BC EFs of 144 and 43.2 mg/kWh for LS-HFO and MGO, respectively. Light absorption was mostly attributed to BC in particles from both fuels, with absorption Ångström exponent (AAE, 370 to 880 nm) values 0.9–1.0 (interquartile range), and 870 nm single scattering albedo (SSA) values 0.15–0.24 during the full cycles. Fresh LS-HFO emissions exhibited lower SSA values than those of high-sulfur fuels reported in literature, primarily associated with reduced sulfate emissions. Photochemical aging led to an absorption enhancement (Eabs) of 1.2–1.5 and an increase in SSA relative to fresh emissions, although SSA remained below 0.5, and the estimated direct radiative forcing effect stayed positive. Our results show that sulfur-compliant marine fuels can emit highly absorbing particles with an atmospheric warming potential, which is mostly maintained even after photochemical aging.

explanation: 该论文使用高分辨率卫星图像和卷积神经网络来分析2004年印度洋海啸后的土地覆盖变化，并将其与人口健康和福祉联系起来。虽然主要关注点不是大气环境遥感技术，但使用卫星图像进行土地覆盖分析是遥感技术的一部分，因此与大气环境遥感技术有较强的相关性。
topic_words: ['high-resolution satellite imagery', 'convolutional neural network', 'land cover changes']
authors: Eric Peshkin;Elizabeth Frankenberg;Peter Katz;Cecep Sumantri;Duncan Thomas
title: High-resolution imagery and neural networks link post-tsunami land cover changes to population health and well-being
abstract:
Land cover changes immediately after the 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami—and over the following four years—were closely linked to population health, mortality, and economic conditions, according to household survey data, a convolutional neural network, and high-resolution satellite imagery. 
 As extreme events intensify in force and frequency across the globe, relating the damage and subsequent reconstruction to population health and well-being remains a critical frontier. Here we build a convolutional neural network to classify landcover from satellite images of Indonesia before and after the December 2004 Indian Ocean Tsunami and link those measures to population well-being to demonstrate methods that advance analyses of short-term impacts of extreme events and impacts 5 years later. Population data are from the Study of the Tsunami Aftermath and Recovery (STAR) and 2005 and 2010 censuses. We develop manually labelled training data for eight landcover classes and demonstrate the model performs well using standard metrics. Moreover, measures of change over time in landcover correlate strongly with multiple dimensions of well-being from our household survey data and with aggregate population statistics, both immediately after the event and in the subsequent five years. Land cover changes immediately after the 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami—and over the following four years—were closely linked to population health, mortality, and economic conditions, according to household survey data, a convolutional neural network, and high-resolution satellite imagery.

explanation: 该论文研究的是甲烷氧化菌从黄铜矿中获取铜的过程，虽然涉及大气环境中的甲烷氧化过程，但主要关注点在于微生物学和地质化学方面，而非大气环境遥感技术，如空气质量监测、卫星观测或大气成分分析等。
authors: Jinglong Hu;Hailiang Dong;Gaoyuan Li;Yizhi Sheng
title: Copper acquisition from mineral promotes aerobic methane oxidation
abstract:
>i/i<OBBP, a methanotroph bacteria extract copper from chalcopyrite through synthesis and secret of a copper-binding metabolite to support cell growth and aerobic microbial methane oxidation, according to gene and protein expression, and metabolites profile analysis. 
 Aerobic microbial methane oxidation plays an important role in the global carbon cycle. This process is catalyzed by enzyme methane monooxygenase. Particulate methane monooxygenase requires copper as a cofactor. However, studies have shown aerobic methanotrophic activity in environments with low aqueous copper. Here we hypothesize that minerals can serve as a source of copper. This hypothesis is tested by incubating a particulate methane monooxygenase-obligate methanotroph Methylocystis parvus OBBP with chalcopyrite. Cell growth, methane oxidation, and copper concentrations were measured. Gene expression, protein expression, and metabolite profiles were characterized. The presence of chalcopyrite promoted cell growth and methane oxidation, with similar rates and extents to those of copper ion. OBBP extracted copper from chalcopyrite by secreting a chalkophore (copper-binding metabolite) through expressions of specific methanobactin gene clusters and proteins. These results provide insights into copper bioavailability and have important implications for methane cycling on early Earth and in modern environments. >i<Methylocystis parvus>/i<OBBP, a methanotroph bacteria extract copper from chalcopyrite through synthesis and secret of a copper-binding metabolite to support cell growth and aerobic microbial methane oxidation, according to gene and protein expression, and metabolites profile analysis.

explanation: 该论文研究河狸湿地对碳循环的影响，涉及大气碳排放和水文变化，与大气环境遥感技术（如大气成分分析、碳汇监测）相关。
authors: Lukas Hallberg;Annegret Larsen;Natalie Ceperley;Raphael d’Epagnier;Tom F. Brouwers;Bettina Schaefli;Sarah Thurnheer;Josep Barba;Christof Angst;Matthew Dennis;Joshua R. Larsen
title: Beavers can convert stream corridors to persistent carbon sinks
abstract:
Beaver-induced hydrological change turned wetland into a net carbon sink with an approximate carbon storage of 100 tons per year, according to a comprehensive carbon budget analysis from a beaver wetland in Switzerland 
 Recent reintroductions of the Eurasian beaver (Castor fiber) across Europe represents an ecological shift with potential implications for carbon cycling in stream corridors. However, the capacity of beaver impacts to influence short- and long-term carbon fluxes, and the mechanisms that govern these changes, remains poorly understood. We present a comprehensive carbon budget of a beaver-influenced stream corridor, covering all major aqueous and atmospheric exchanges, as well as biomass and sedimentary carbon storages, from a beaver wetland in Switzerland. By integrating carbon flux measurements with hydrology and bathymetry, we identify dominant pathways and dynamics in gaseous carbon emissions. Annually, the beaver wetland was a net carbon sink (98.3 ± 34.4 t yr-1), driven by subsurface removal of dissolved inorganic carbon. Carbon dioxide emissions were the dominant source of carbon loss, seasonally shifting the system to a net carbon source during summer water recession. Projecting the long-term sediment and deadwood storage following wetland infilling, our upper estimate of sequestered carbon was 1194 t (10.1 t ha-1 yr-1), nearly an order of magnitude greater than without beaver modification. Our findings demonstrate that beaver-induced hydrological change is fundamentally reshaping carbon cycling and reinforces the relevance of headwater catchments in climate change mitigation strategies. Beaver-induced hydrological change turned wetland into a net carbon sink with an approximate carbon storage of 100 tons per year, according to a comprehensive carbon budget analysis from a beaver wetland in Switzerland

explanation: 该论文主要关注青藏高原的洪水对气候变化的不同尺度响应，涉及地理、地貌和气候因素，但未提及与大气环境遥感技术直接相关的主题，如空气质量监测、卫星观测或大气成分分析。
authors: Xiang Li;Peng Cui;Pengke Shen;Xueqin Zhang
title: Unraveling scale-dependent flood responses to changing climate extremes over the Tibetan Plateau
abstract:
Terrestrial water fluxes on the Tibetan Plateau respond to climate change in uniquely scale-dependent ways shaped by its geography and geomorphology, as shown through analyses of historical observations and modelling. 
 Understanding the dynamic interplay between floods and climate extremes in the Tibetan Plateau has long been constrained by scale fragmentation. Here, we elucidate the scale-dependent responses using historical observations and modelling. The average flood day and annual maximum daily discharge are governed by two complementary pathways: atmospheric input and catchment modulation. Spatially, flood drivers shift from cryosphere control in the west to monsoon control in the east. Crucially, low-order tributaries are dominated by the atmospheric source mechanism, responding instantaneously to high-intensity precipitation, while catchment modulators play a more important role in high-order mainstems. Furthermore, cross-watershed analysis further underscores that upstream temperature changes contribute 4.0% to downstream flood frequency and 6.4% to magnitude variability via hydrological connectivity. The scale-specific disparities, shaped by the synergistic effects of watershed hydrological processes, underlying surface heterogeneity, climate factor sensitivities, and climate-cryosphere interactions, establish a framework for alpine flood attribution and predictive models. Terrestrial water fluxes on the Tibetan Plateau respond to climate change in uniquely scale-dependent ways shaped by its geography and geomorphology, as shown through analyses of historical observations and modelling.

explanation: 该论文研究生物质能结合碳捕获与封存（BECCS）技术对气候的影响，涉及木材的级联利用和森林碳动态，这与大气环境遥感技术中的大气成分分析和碳汇监测密切相关，因此具有强相关性。
authors: George Bishop;Colm Duffy;Göran Berndes;Miguel Brandão;Annette Cowie;John R. Healey;Christiane Hennig;Kati Koponen;James Gaffey;David Styles
title: Cascading wood use into bioenergy with carbon capture and storage ensures continuous and enduring temperature reduction
abstract:
Using wood in cascading applications provides stronger near-term cooling benefits through material substitution than sending it directly to bioenergy, while also offering temporary carbon storage according to a dynamic life cycle analysis 
 Bioenergy with carbon capture and storage (BECCS) is a key component of pathways to net zero, yet potential interactions with forest carbon dynamics, cascading wood strategies, and progressive decarbonisation and CCS deployment are poorly represented in assessments. Here, using dynamic life cycle assessment, we explore these factors for sawmill residue-derived BECCS value chains over long, yet flexible, time-horizons. BECCS improves the climate performance of bioenergy and consistently delivers long-term global cooling, even in a fully decarbonised economy where substitution benefits cease, provided forest carbon stocks are maintained. Cascading wood use delivers greater near-term cooling via product substitutions compared to direct diversion to bioenergy, and provides temporary carbon storage complementing later deployment of permanent carbon storage via BECCS. Without cascading use, unharvested forests can deliver stronger near-term cooling than direct diversion to bioenergy, even with full BECCS deployment. However, the sink strength diminishes as forests mature, and sequestered carbon may be vulnerable to disturbances such as wildfire. Crossover points highlight the critical role of cascading wood use coupled with BECCS to ensure continuous and enduring cooling effects. Transferring biogenic carbon from forests to geological stores, via multiple uses, is likely to enhance the longevity and resilience of carbon dioxide removal in a rapidly warming world. Using wood in cascading applications provides stronger near-term cooling benefits through material substitution than sending it directly to bioenergy, while also offering temporary carbon storage according to a dynamic life cycle analysis

explanation: 该论文研究利用太阳诱导叶绿素荧光（SIF）技术监测干旱胁迫对植物 canopy 的影响，涉及大气环境遥感技术中的植物生理和生化变化监测，与大气环境遥感技术（如空气质量监测、卫星观测、大气成分分析、气溶胶反演）密切相关。
topic_words: ['sun-induced chlorophyll fluorescence', 'canopy photosynthesis', 'drought stress', 'remote sensing', 'atmospheric composition analysis']
authors: Georg Wohlfahrt;Albin Hammerle;Felix M. Spielmann;Anna de Vries;Lorenz Hänchen;Javier Pacheco-Labrador;Mirco Migliavacca
title: Proximal sensing of drought stress with sun-induced chlorophyll fluorescence: A tale of scaling up and down
abstract:
•Drought reduced the chlorophyll fluorescence yield at leaf and canopy scale. •Drought caused changes in canopy structure of herbaceous canopies. •Canopy structural changes strongly modulated TOC SIF. •TOC SIF captured physiological drought response, but not earlier than NIRv. •Leaf TOC fluorescence yields poorly match canopy; upscaling improves agreement. 
 Sun-induced chlorophyll fluorescence (SIF) is used to infer canopy photosynthesis, yet its ability to isolate physiological from canopy structural signals remains uncertain. We aimed at testing whether SIF can disentangle the onset and progression of physiological drought stress amidst concurrent canopy biochemical/physical changes, and to evaluate links between leaf- and canopy-scale fluorescence. To this end, a mesocosm experiment manipulating water availability (control vs. drought) in two herbaceous canopies with contrasting leaf angle distributions (planophile vs. erectophile) was conducted. We monitored environmental conditions, chlorophyll fluorescence at leaf- and canopy-scale using an active and passive approach, canopy biochemical/physical properties, and used the SCOPE model to upscale from leaf- to canopy-scale and analyse drivers. Drought progressively reduced soil water content, depressed stomatal conductance, and upregulated non-photochemical quenching, yielding lower fluorescence yields at leaf and canopy scales. TOC SIF showed a significant response to drought; however, neither TOC SIF nor down-scaled SIF detected stress earlier than NIRv. Modelling and observations indicated strong non-physiological influences on TOC SIF, especially as drought altered biochemical/physical canopy attributes. Leaf-scale TOC fluorescence yields were higher and poorly correlated with canopy-scale yields, whereas SCOPE-based upscaling improved agreement. We conclude that SIF robustly captures drought onset, but offers limited early-detection advantage over greenness indices when concurrent canopy structural/biochemical changes are substantial.

explanation: 该研究涉及利用Fraunhofer线荧光技术监测杏树园的水分胁迫动态，这属于大气环境遥感技术中的光谱分析范畴，与大气成分分析和遥感监测相关。

title: Divergent sensitivity of red and far-red Fraunhofer line fluorescence in-filling to water stress dynamics in almond orchards

explanation: 该研究使用高光谱和多光谱卫星数据预测北方沼泽地的地表土壤湿度，涉及卫星观测（EnMAP和Sentinel-2）、数据处理算法（连续小波变换）以及大气环境要素（土壤湿度），与大气环境遥感技术密切相关。
authors: Susanna Karlqvist;Hermanni Aaltonen;Mika Aurela;Iuliia Burdun;Mika Korkiakoski;Erik Lundin;Matthias Peichl;Sini-Selina Salko;Eeva-Stiina Tuittila;Miina Rautiainen
title: Predicting surface soil moisture of northern peatlands from hyper- and multispectral satellite data
abstract:
•Ground reference data on peatland soil moisture from Finland, Sweden and Estonia •Continuous wavelet transform on hyperspectral satellite data for peatland moisture •Hyperspectral EnMAP outperforms multispectral Sentinel-2 for moisture estimation. •Spectral resolution outweighs spatial resolution for peatland moisture estimation. 
 Northern peatlands are critical carbon stores that are highly sensitive to hydrological conditions. Changes in these conditions, driven by climate change and land-use modifications, can even shift peatlands from carbon sinks to sources. Consequently, effective management of both natural and restored peatlands requires monitoring of hydrological parameters such as soil moisture. Recently launched hyperspectral satellites like EnMAP provide new capabilities for this monitoring through enhanced spectral resolution.This study presents a novel framework for estimating peatland soil moisture content by applying Continuous Wavelet Transform (CWT) with real-valued Morlet wavelet to EnMAP satellite data. We evaluated the performance of CWT-processed data against original EnMAP bands, multispectral Sentinel-2 data, and spectral moisture indices across nine peatland sites spanning hemiboreal, boreal, sub-Arctic, and Arctic zones in Finland, Sweden, and Estonia. The CWT-processed EnMAP model achieved the highest predictive accuracy (R2 = 0.67, RMSE = 14.02%), followed by original EnMAP bands (R2 = 0.50, RMSE = 17.23%), while Sentinel-2 bands showed substantially lower performance (R2 = 0.32, RMSE = 20.09%) despite having finer spatial resolution. These results suggest that spectral resolution outweighs spatial resolution for peatland soil moisture estimation. Spectral moisture indices performed poorly with both satellite sensors (R2 = 0.00–0.17), demonstrating the limitations of single band combinations compared to full spectral approaches. While spatial mismatch between ground measurements and satellite pixel size, along with limited hyperspectral data availability, constrained this study, our results demonstrate the potential of hyperspectral satellite data and CWT for peatland soil moisture monitoring. Future validation across diverse peatland types and restoration conditions would further strengthen these findings.

explanation: 该论文主要关注土壤有机质的时空深度学习框架，虽然使用了遥感数据（如Landsat-8 OLI）和气象数据（ERA5），但其核心目标是土壤有机质的区域映射，而非大气环境遥感技术（如空气质量监测、卫星观测等）。
authors: Chong Luo;Jiale Geng;Jun Lu;Depiao Kong;Xiangtian Meng;Huanjun Liu
title: A transferable spatiotemporal deep learning framework integrating soil moisture dynamics for high-resolution cropland soil organic matter mapping across regions
abstract:
•A spatiotemporal deep learning framework (ExP-C) is developed for large-scale SOM mapping. •Refactored soil moisture dynamic feedback sequences (SMDFS) enhance SOM prediction. •ExP-C integrates spatial expert convolutions and multi-scale temporal pattern mining. •Transfer learning enables cross-regional adaptation between China and the U.S. black soils. •The study advances mechanistic and transferable SOM mapping for global cropland monitoring. 
 Soil organic matter (SOM) is a critical indicator of soil health and agricultural sustainability, yet achieving high-resolution mapping at large scales remains challenging due to the complex interplay of environmental drivers, particularly soil moisture dynamics. This study introduces a novel spatiotemporal deep learning framework, ExP-C, that incorporates refactored soil moisture dynamic feedback sequences (SMDFS) to enhance SOM prediction accuracy. Focusing on two major black soil regions—Northeast China (CN, 1.24 million km2) and the U.S. Mississippi River Basin (USA, 1.35 million km2)—we compiled 2616 topsoil (0-20 cm) samples from field surveys (2014-2024) and the WoSIS database, integrated with Landsat-8 OLI bare-soil composites, SRTM-derived topographic variables, and ERA5 meteorological data. SMDFS are generated via percentile refactoring of multi-temporal moisture indices (MNDWI, NDWI, NDMI) to capture dynamic feedbacks between SOM levels and moisture retention. The ExP-C model fuses expert convolutional networks for spatial contextual extraction from static covariates, pyramid 1D convolutions for multi-scale SMDFS pattern mining, and contrastive learning to bolster feature representations, with transfer learning (pre-training on CN data, fine-tuning on USA data) enabling cross-regional adaptation. Ten-fold cross-validation yielded superior performance for ExP-C compared to random forest and CNN-LSTM baselines: R2 = 0.712 (RMSE = 6.221 g/kg) in CN and R2 = 0.554 (RMSE = 7.693 g/kg) in the USA when integrating SMDFS with spatial features, with SMDFS alone boosting R2 by 13%–17% on static inputs. Gradient-based attribution confirmed SMDFS and elevation as dominant contributors, underscoring their mechanistic role in SOM variability. Transfer learning further improved USA predictions to R2 = 0.572 (RMSE = 7.597 g/kg) using a partial freeze strategy on spatial branches. High-resolution (30 m) SOM maps revealed north-south gradients in both regions, with mean contents of 32.0 g/kg (CN) and 36.8 g/kg (USA), and low uncertainty (means of 4.03 and 4.79 g/kg, respectively). This framework advances SOM mapping by explicitly modeling moisture-SOM feedbacks, offering a robust, transferable approach for monitoring carbon dynamics in global croplands and informing sustainable management.

explanation: 该论文使用卫星遥感技术和时空图注意力网络（STGAT）重建高分辨率海洋次表层温度，这与大气环境遥感技术中的海洋成分分析和卫星观测高度相关。
authors: Jiawei Xun;Jungang Yang;Shibao Li;Ole Baltazar Andersen;Wei Cui;Jie Sun;Haoran Gu
title: Satellite-based reconstruction of high-resolution ocean subsurface temperature using spatiotemporal graph attention networks
abstract:
•STGAT model is developed to reconstruct high-resolution subsurface Temperature from satellites. •Multi-source satellite data and DSTAG enable high-accuracy reconstruction of ocean subsurface temperatures. •Joint training on reanalysis and EN4 data enhances subsurface temperature fidelity. 
 The distribution and variation of ocean temperature are closely associated with ocean dynamic processes. High-precision ocean subsurface temperature fields are critical for studies on ocean dynamics and climate change. While satellite remote sensing provides extensive data on sea surface temperature, it lacks direct observations of ocean subsurface temperatures. In-situ measurements typically result in sparse and uneven spatiotemporal data coverage. Consequently, obtaining accurate high-resolution ocean subsurface temperature data remains a significant challenge in marine science. This study introduces a novel ocean subsurface temperature reconstruction model based on Spatiotemporal Graph Attention Networks (STGAT). STGAT is capable of inferring subsurface temperature fields from multiple satellite-derived sea surface observations, including Sea Level Anomaly (SLA), Sea Surface Temperature (SST), Sea Surface Salinity (SSS) and Sea Surface Wind (SSW), as well as the derived Depth-Specific Temperature Anomaly Gradient (DSTAG). The Kuroshio Extension region in the Northwest Pacific, characterized by intense ocean dynamic activity, was selected as the experimental area. Ocean temperature fields at 21 depth levels (20–1941 m) for 2022 were reconstructed using satellite sea surface observations from 2017 to 2022. The accuracy of the reconstructed subsurface temperature fields was evaluated using the GLORYS12V1 reanalysis datasets and the EN4 in-situ observation datasets. Comparative analysis with reanalysis data demonstrates that the proposed model effectively captures the spatiotemporal characteristics of ocean temperature across all depth levels, accurately reflecting realistic spatial distributions throughout the water column. The reconstructed subsurface temperature fields achieved mean RMSE and R2 values of 0.916 °C and 0.866, respectively. Validation against EN4 data further confirms that the model’s ability to reproduce vertical thermal variations, with mean RMSE and R2 values of 0.898 °C and 0.976, respectively. When compared with other machine learning-derived models, the STGAT model demonstrates superior performance in terms of reconstruction accuracy. In conclusion, the STGAT model effectively addresses the challenges posed by complex and highly turbulent oceanic processes, offering a promising new approach for retrieving high-resolution and high-accuracy ocean subsurface temperature data.

journal: International Journal of Applied Earth Observation and Geoinformation
explanation: 该论文研究了在复杂地形中通过生成式贝叶斯深度学习进行雪深估计的问题，这与大气环境遥感技术中的地表参数反演和监测密切相关。论文涉及的数据增强、不确定性建模等技术在大气环境遥感领域（如空气质量监测、卫星观测等）有广泛应用。
topic_words: ['few-shot learning', 'generative-Bayesian deep learning', 'snow depth estimation', 'remote sensing', 'uncertainty-aware modeling']
authors: Jinliang Hou;Ying Zhang;Peng Dou;Xiaohua Hao;Yuanhong You;Chunlin Huang
title: Uncertainty-aware few-shot snow depth estimation in complex terrains via generative-Bayesian deep learning
abstract:
•Novel Generative-Bayesian Few-Shot Framework for robust, uncertainty-aware SD estimation. •Where-Way-What Strategy identifies gaps, generates samples, and trains reliable models. •cWGAN-GP produces realistic and diverse SD time-series samples for scarce regions. •Bayesian BiGRU enhances generalization with calibrated, interpretable uncertainty. •Achieves MAE < 2 cm and strong robustness across complex, data-limited terrains. 
 Accurate snow depth (SD) estimation is critical for understanding cold-region hydrology, land–atmosphere interactions, and cryosphere dynamics. Deep learning (DL) offers transformative potential for remote sensing SD estimation, yet sparse, uneven, and terrain-dependent in-situ measurements make it a typical few-shot problem, limiting generalization and predictive reliability. To address this, we propose a Generative-Bayesian Framework for Few-Shot SD Estimation (GB-FSSD) that integrates physically consistent generative data augmentation with uncertainty-aware recurrent modeling. GB-FSSD mitigates scarcity, imbalance, and limited representativeness through targeted synthetic sample generation. Guided by a Where-Way-What strategy: (i) Where, underrepresented Alpine and Forest regimes are identified via sample-space representativeness analysis; (ii) Way, a conditional Wasserstein GAN with gradient penalty (cWGAN-GP) generates physically plausible and statistically consistent synthetic sample time series; (iii) What, a Bayesian bidirectional GRU is trained on the augmented dataset, with optimal augmentation scales determined by predictive accuracy and uncertainty. Applied to China’s 2019–2020 snow season, GB-FSSD achieves MAE < 2 cm, R2 > 0.84, and average predictive uncertainty ∼ 0.46  cm, demonstrating robust generalization under data-limited conditions. By integrating spatial representativeness analysis, generative augmentation, and uncertainty-aware modeling, GB-FSSD provides a scalable and generalizable framework for Earth Observation-based geophysical variable estimation, with broad applicability to cryosphere and Earth system studies.

explanation: 该论文研究了北京-天津-河北地区的PM2.5污染，开发了一个高分辨率的简化大气化学模型，并进行了验证和源解析，这与大气环境遥感技术中的空气质量监测和污染源分析密切相关。
authors: Ruili Wu;Xinying Qin;Shigan Liu;Yifei Chen;Yilin Zhao;Wei Wang;Qiang Zhang
title: A high-resolution simplified atmospheric chemistry model for the Beijing–Tianjin–Hebei region: Development, validation, and refined source apportionment
abstract:
•Develop a 4 km high-resolution simplified atmospheric chemistry model for the Beijing–Tianjin–Hebei region and its surrounding areas. •Validate the model with observational datasets showing good agreement in simulating air pollutants. •Provide refined source apportionment results to support targeted air pollution control in the study area. •Demonstrate the model's advantage in balancing computational efficiency and simulation accuracy. 
 Fine particulate matter (PM2.5) pollution remains a critical issue in air quality management for the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei (BTH) region and its surrounding areas. With continuous air quality improvement, refined PM2.5 pollution control calls for precise source apportionment, which has not been well achieved due to the limited efficiency and resolution of existing models. Based on the InMAP-China framework, a high-resolution simplified atmospheric chemistry model (InMAP-BTH) was developed for the 2019 BTH region to quantify refined PM2.5 contributions from 23 emission sectors at regional and urban scales. The model performed well in simulating PM2.5 concentrations (correlation coefficient is 0.59, normalized mean error is 27.7%) with low computational cost and high efficiency. Results showed that iron and steel plants were the top PM2.5 contributor (5.49 μg/m3) in 2019, followed by on-road diesel trucks, residential coal combustion and off-road mobile sources. Dominant sources varied distinctly across cities with significant spatial heterogeneity. This study highlights the importance of targeted control strategies based on refined sectoral and urban source differences for regional PM2.5 management.

explanation: 该研究使用卫星数据（VIIRS和MODIS）分析了中国生物质燃烧的时空变化和气象控制，涉及大气污染和遥感技术，因此与大气环境遥感技术密切相关。
authors: Guangyi Yang;Fei Liu;Guangqin Zhu;Ling Yang;Hongmei Zhao;Guolei Chen
title: Status of biomass burning in China (2012−2024): A satellite-based spatiotemporal assessment
abstract:
•Biomass burning declined sharply due to strengthened policies and residue management. •Weather-dependent thresholds provide guidance for regionally tailored fire management. •Integrated fire management is recommended as a sustainable alternative to suppression. 
 Biomass burning is a major contributor to atmospheric pollution and short-term climate forcing, yet its spatiotemporal variability and associated meteorological constraints in China are not fully characterized. Using Visible Infrared Imaging Radiometer Suite (VIIRS) active fire data from 2012 to 2024, combined with MODIS land-cover information and ERA5 meteorological reanalysis, this study investigated temporal trends, spatial heterogeneity, and meteorological controls of biomass burning across four vegetation types—cropland, forest, grassland, and savanna. Results revealed distinct temporal trends among vegetation classes. Cropland fires declined sharply after 2018, while grassland fires showed a steady long-term decrease. In contrast, forest and savanna fires exhibited greater interannual variability and partial recovery after 2020. Spatially, the North China Plain and Northeast China dominate agricultural residue burning, whereas forest and savanna fires were concentrated in south regions such as Yunnan and Guangxi. Kernel density analyses revealed that biomass burning occurrences are strongly constrained within narrow meteorological windows, e.g., under light precipitation (<3−4 mm/day), low-to-moderate winds (<4 m/s), and vegetation-specific ranges of temperature–humidity and moisture deficit. This study clarified the spatiotemporal variability of biomass burning across China and identified the distinct atmospheric conditions under which different fire types most frequently occur, offering a useful basis for improving regionally tailored fire-risk monitoring and control measures.

explanation: 该论文研究超细颗粒物（UFP）的形成和来源，涉及城市和背景站点的空气污染监测，与大气环境遥感技术（如空气质量监测和大气成分分析）密切相关。
authors: Hosna Movahhedinia;Jonathan M. Wang;Nathan Hilker;Cheol-Heon Jeong;Yushan Su;Greg J. Evans
title: Ultrafine particle formation across urban and background sites: Insights on Midday Pollution events through analysis of locally emitted pollutants
abstract:
•Days were classified based on the dominant sources of UFP at four sites. •Particle amplification happened on the identified Midday Pollution (MP) days. •Particle amplification increased with distance from nearby traffic. •Na/Cl molar ratios were higher on MP days than on other days in winter. 
 Ultrafine particles (UFPs, <100 nm) are associated with health and environmental risks. Reducing exposure to these particles requires identifying their origin. This study classified days into five categories based on dominant sources of UFP during the day: Strong Nucleation, Midday Pollution, Traffic Pollution, Baseline, and Mixed. The primary focus was on Midday Pollution days; days that showed higher UFP concentrations around noon, without evidence of particle formation. The classification was performed manually using particle size distribution data (6–523 nm) collected from 2006 to 2021 at the Southern Ontario Center for Atmospheric Aerosol Research (SOCAAR). The same types of days were also identified based on total particle number concentration data using ensemble learning models at three additional sites with differing concentrations of UFP: Hanlan’s Point (a background site with no local traffic), Downsview (an urban background site 250 meters from the nearest roadway), and Highway 401 (a site located near a major highway). The classified days at these locations had patterns consistent with those at SOCAAR. The noon-to-morning ratio of UFP at Hanlan’s Point was roughly twice that of SOCAAR and Highway 401, indicating more intense particle amplification at the background site. Midday Pollution days occurred more frequently during colder months. Higher sodium to chloride molar ratios on Midday Pollution days indicated that the atmospheric chemistry was different compared to other types of days. These results indicate that concentrations of UFP may rise midday due to a process other than new particle formation events.

explanation: 该论文研究的是东亚沿海地区大气气溶胶中水溶性有机氮的分布和来源，涉及空气质量监测和大气成分分析，与大气环境遥感技术密切相关。
authors: Chao Yu;Yujue Wang;Yuqi Guo;Yiwen Zhang;Yue Jiang;Meijing Guo;Qi Yuan;Xiaohong Yao;Huiwang Gao
title: Distribution and sources of water-soluble organic nitrogen in atmospheric aerosols in the coastal areas of East Asia
abstract:
•WSON account for 29% of the total nitrogen in aerosols in coastal Qingdao. •Anthropogenic secondary formation was the most important source of WSON. •Dust and aged sea salt are important for WSON formation in spring and summer. •WSON formation could be promoted by elevated aerosol liquid water and NO2. 
 An increase in organic nitrogen outflows from atmospheric pollutants in East Asia to the oceans was reported in recent years. However, the distribution or sources of atmospheric organic nitrogen in coastal areas have been less understood than in polluted urban environments. Here, we conducted field observations in coastal Qingdao, East Asia, across seasons to understand the sources and influence factors of water-soluble organic nitrogen (WSON) in atmospheric aerosols. The annual mean concentration of WSON in PM2.5 was 2.92 ± 3.43 μgN/m3, accounting for 2%–91% (29% on average) of the water-soluble total nitrogen (NO3−–N + NH4+–N + WSON). The WSON abundance followed the seasonal order of winter > spring > autumn > summer due to the severe influence of anthropogenic pollutants in winter and dust episodes in spring. Anthropogenic secondary formation was apportioned as the most important source of WSON in coastal Qingdao, accounting for 30%–52% of the total WSON. The anthropogenic secondary formation source of WSON was dominated by secondary sulfate formation in summer and by secondary nitrate formation in the other three seasons. The contribution of dust to WSON increased to 32% in spring, compared to 2%−6% during the non-dust seasons. During summer, aged sea salt accounted for 40% of the WSON formation under the influence of marine monsoons in coastal areas. The formation of WSON could be promoted by the increase of aerosol liquid water (ALW) and NO2 concentrations. When ALW< 50 μg/m3, WSON concentrations increased obviously with the elevation of ALW, and ALW could be a limiting factor for WSON formation. Our results highlight the importance of WSON among total nitrogen in aerosols and distinct sources driving the WSON formation in different seasons in coastal atmospheres.

explanation: 该论文研究了地下氚源区域大气中氚的浓度水平和释放机制，涉及大气环境监测，与遥感技术中的空气质量和大气成分分析相关。

title: Investigation of tritium concentration levels and mechanisms of its release to the atmospheric air in an area with an underground source of tritium
